title: Transcrafters War On Cybercraft
description: Transcrafters War On Cybercraft is a Mod That me and a few people created Cause we wanted Transformers War and Fall of cybertron into Minecraft WE ALSO GOT A MC SERVER FOR IT.
body:
Transcrafters: War on Cybercraft is a Minecraft mod that brings the epic war between robotic factions straight into your gameplay! While many Transformers-inspired mods have been abandoned or left behind, Transcrafters is an active project with ongoing updates, improvements, and new features!

IF YOU USE THIS MOD IN A VIDEO, PLEASE CREDIT US IN THE DESCRIPTION!

DISCLAIMER: We do not own any official Transformers characters or content. All rights to the Transformers IP belong to Hasbro. This is a fan-made project created out of passion and respect for the franchise.

CURRENT FEATURES:

Full character transformations using model swaps

Alternate forms per character

Emissive neon textures and glowing parts

WIP transformation animations

Custom abilities and more!

GET STARTED
To become a Transformer in-game, use the command:
/transcrafter 

STATUS: EARLY DEVELOPMENT
Please note: This mod is still heavily under development. Expect bugs, placeholders, and temporary models as we build something awesome.

JOIN THE COMMUNITY
Want to be a Beta Tester or help as a Developer? Join our growing community:
Discord: https://discord.gg/Zj4PEFDCzf

Current Version: 1.0.0-alpha
Minecraft Version: 1.20.1 (Forge)

Crafted with passion by the Transcrafters Dev Team
